steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Lines $l$ and $m$ are parallel and are cut by a transversal. The angle marked $x^\circ$ is in the corresponding position to the angle marked $111^\circ$.

steps.title: Set the angles equal
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines are equal, so $$ x=111 $$ The answer is C.
